metadata.name: sss_transfer_hook
metadata.description: Solana Stablecoin Standard - Transfer Hook Program

accounts.name: blacklister_role
docs: Verified by checking owner == sss-core program ID and re-deriving the
expected PDA address from known seeds using the mint key.

accounts.name: extra_account_metas
docs: for this mint. Created and initialized in this instruction.

accounts.name: blacklister_role
docs: Verified by checking owner == sss-core program ID and re-deriving the
expected PDA address from known seeds using the mint key.

accounts.name: extra_account_metas
docs: [b"extra-account-metas", mint]. Not validated here since Token-2022
handles resolution.

accounts.name: sender_blacklist
docs: ExtraAccountMetaList. If this account exists (has data, owned by this
program), the sender is blacklisted and the transfer is rejected.

accounts.name: receiver_blacklist
docs: ExtraAccountMetaList. If this account exists (has data, owned by this
program), the receiver is blacklisted and the transfer is rejected.

accounts.name: config
docs: Protocol configuration account. Resolved by Token-2022 from
ExtraAccountMetaList. Used to check the "paused" state.

types.name: BlacklistAdded
docs: Emitted when an address is added to the blacklist.
Compliance systems MUST monitor this event to maintain up-to-date
denylist state off-chain. The `reason` field should contain only
compliance reference codes — never include PII (name, SSN, etc.)
as this data is stored permanently on-chain.

fields.name: mint
docs: The stablecoin mint this entry applies to.

fields.name: address
docs: The wallet address that was blacklisted.

fields.name: added_by
docs: The blacklister who added this entry.

fields.name: added_at
docs: Unix timestamp when the entry was created.

fields.name: reason
docs: Compliance reason (reference code, not PII).

fields.name: mint
docs: The stablecoin mint this entry applies to.

fields.name: address
docs: The wallet address that is blacklisted.

fields.name: added_by
docs: The admin who added this entry.

fields.name: added_at
docs: Unix timestamp when the entry was created.

fields.name: reason
docs: Compliance reason for blacklisting (max 512 chars).

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed.

types.name: BlacklistRemoved
docs: Emitted when an address is removed from the blacklist.

fields.name: mint
docs: The stablecoin mint this entry applied to.

fields.name: address
docs: The wallet address that was removed from the blacklist.

fields.name: removed_by
docs: The blacklister who removed this entry.

fields.name: name
docs: Stablecoin name (max 32 bytes).

fields.name: symbol
docs: Stablecoin ticker symbol (max 10 bytes).

fields.name: uri
docs: Metadata URI (max 200 bytes, may be empty).

fields.name: decimals
docs: Token decimals (e.g. 6 for USDC-style).

fields.name: enable_permanent_delegate
docs: Whether the config PDA is set as permanent delegate on token accounts.

fields.name: enable_transfer_hook
docs: Whether a transfer hook program is attached to the mint.

fields.name: default_account_frozen
docs: Whether new token accounts are frozen by default (requires explicit thaw).

fields.name: admin_count
docs: Number of active admins. Used to prevent revoking the last admin.

fields.name: oracle_feed_id
docs: Pyth price feed ID (32-byte hex) that oracle-gated minting must match.
`None` means oracle-adjusted minting is disabled for this stablecoin.
Must be set via `update_oracle_feed` before passing a `price_update` account
to `mint_tokens`. Using a wildcard (all-zeros) is explicitly rejected.
